message:
fix: add label inheritance and post-create Dolt commit to create-form --parent

Match bd create --parent behavior:
- Inherit parent labels onto child (GH#2100)
- Commit post-create metadata (deps, labels) to Dolt (GH#2009)
- Track postCreateWrites for all AddDependency/AddLabel calls
